Furry Mancrushes.question: Who is Incineroar?
Furry Mancrushes.answer: A heel tiger that's on fire.

Furry Mancrushes.question: Who is Bowser?
Furry Mancrushes.answer: He's a turtle dad and he's very bad.

Furry Mancrushes.question: Who is Ben Bigger?
Furry Mancrushes.answer: He's an accountant who only needs one eye to swing around a concrete pillar.

Furry Mancrushes.question: Who is Bandit Heeler?
Furry Mancrushes.answer: An Australian Archaeologist with an equal number of brothers and daughters.

Furry Mancrushes.question: Who is Tony the Tiger?
Furry Mancrushes.answer: A blue-nosed twitch streamer who is banned in at least 4 countries.

Con Drama.question: What is Biggest Little Fur Con?
Con Drama.answer: Attendees displayed an unauthorized pizza topping at this convention.

Con Drama.question: What is Free Fur All?
Con Drama.answer: This "convention" was attended by a fursuiter with the world's worst bowl cut.

Con Drama.question: What is Texas Furry Fiesta?
Con Drama.answer: A next-gen portrait shot on an iPhone 15 pro haunted this convention.

Con Drama.question: What is Furality?
Con Drama.answer: You can make anyone who bothers you disappear at this convention.

Con Drama.question: What is DEF CON?
Con Drama.answer: A non-furry convention attended by a lot of furries that is widely misunderstood.

Information Technology.question: What is Rebooting?
Information Technology.answer: Probably the thing people lie about doing the most.

Information Technology.question: What is Two-Factor Authentication?
Information Technology.answer: Just a password alone isn't enough when using this to log in.

Information Technology.question: What is a Worm?
Information Technology.answer: You can use them to catch a fish and infect a computer with contagious malware.

Information Technology.question: What is a Help Desk?
Information Technology.answer: Even if you can't drive, you can work at one to respond to a ton of tickets.

Fictional Species.question: What are protogens?
Fictional Species.answer: A race of robotic anthropomorphic cyborgs have LCD screens for faces.

Fictional Species.question: What is a Taidum?
Fictional Species.answer: A small canine loaf creature with a tadpole tail.

Fictional Species.question: What is a Pooltoy?
Fictional Species.answer: A latex creature that floats on water.

Fictional Species.question: What is a Sergal?
Fictional Species.answer: A shark-headed mammal with kangaroo feet.

Fictional Species.question: What are Dragons?
Fictional Species.answer: These winged reptilian creatures are known to hoard valuable items.

Real(ly Obscure) Species.question: What are Bears?
Real(ly Obscure) Species.answer: These o(h)-so large animals take very long naps.

Real(ly Obscure) Species.question: What is a Red Fox?
Real(ly Obscure) Species.answer: Though this species has "red" in the name, many fursonas of this species are not red at all.

Real(ly Obscure) Species.question: What is a Maned Wolf?
Real(ly Obscure) Species.answer: This apple-eating species has plenty of leg to stand on.

Real(ly Obscure) Species.question: What are Martens?
Real(ly Obscure) Species.answer: A species that shares a name with a line of boots made by someone with a graduate degree.

Real(ly Obscure) Species.question: What is an Axolotl?
Real(ly Obscure) Species.answer: This Mexican creature can regrow its own pink severed limbs.

Lexicon and Lingo.question: What is a Fursona?
Lexicon and Lingo.answer: An anthropomorphic animal character that represents someone personally.

Lexicon and Lingo.question: What is a Greymuzzle?
Lexicon and Lingo.answer: A furry that can order off of the senior menu.

Lexicon and Lingo.question: What is Post-Con Depression?
Lexicon and Lingo.answer: A profound sadness experienced after a convention.

Lexicon and Lingo.question: What is "Awoo"?
Lexicon and Lingo.answer: An alternative onomatopoeia used in place of "howl"
